comparison_id.description: Unique identifier for this comparison, e.g. 'A-010_vs_B-007'

task_id.description: Identifier for the task/scenario this run belongs to. Null if task categorization isn't yet in use.

version_a.description: Run ID of the baseline version

version_b.description: Run ID of the version being evaluated

regression_detected.description: True if any pattern findings were detected between version_a and version_b

confidence_score.description: How confident the engine is that version_b is safe to deploy. Computed as: 0.0 if any hard gate fired; 1.0 if no findings at all; otherwise 1.0 - (total_weighted_score / 20), clamped between 0 and 1. This is a simple heuristic, not a statistically validated model.

risk_level.description: Derived from the classifier verdict: pass -> low, warn -> medium, fail -> high

changes.description: Raw list of pattern findings detected between version_a and version_b

cost.description: Not yet tracked; always null until cost data exists

matched_pattern.description: The single highest-severity pattern matched, or null if no findings

hard_gate_triggered.description: True if any hard-gate pattern fired, forcing an automatic fail regardless of score

reasons.description: Short human-readable explanations backing the verdict
